user.title: Connect to CANtera
user.description:
Enter the local IP address of the Raspberry Pi running the CANtera OBD-II logger.

Use the Pi's **local network IP** (e.g. `192.168.x.x`). Tailscale IPs (`100.x.x.x`) require the Tailscale add-on with subnet routing enabled in Home Assistant.

Start CANtera with `cantera -b 500000 log-obd --api` to enable the HTTP API.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the CANtera API. Check that the Pi is reachable and running `cantera log-obd --api`.
error.host_unreachable: Host unreachable. Verify the IP address and network routing. Tailscale IPs require the Tailscale add-on with subnet routing — use the local IP instead.
error.connection_refused: Connection refused. The host is reachable but CANtera is not listening on this port. Start it with `cantera log-obd --api`.
